column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Polk, Hardee until Aug 04 2:00PM. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest weather information.
We had a funnel cloud in Lake Wales... no alert at all. Everyone said it travels from Crooked Lake to downtown Lake Wales. No one knows if it ever touched down.
Monsoon just started in royal highlands section of Brooksville!
I’m in St. Augustine. Would it be better to head back to Clearwater today or tomorrow?
